blended.narrative: Copper Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,240 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.7" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
